name: S-400 Triumf
description: Russia's most capable long-range air defense system, able to engage aircraft, cruise missiles, and ballistic targets at ranges up to 400km. A major export success and geopolitical lever.

specialAbilities.name: Layered Engagement Zones
specialAbilities.description: Four different missile types provide overlapping engagement envelopes from 2km to 400km range.

specialAbilities.name: Anti-Access/Area Denial
specialAbilities.description: Creates a no-fly zone that denies enemy air operations across a vast area, reshaping the battlespace.
